name: Air Liquide S.A.
h1: Air Liquide's GCC footprint in India
lede: Air Liquide runs five capability centers across four Indian cities. New Delhi, Chennai, Chengalpattu and Mumbai, covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing, built over 34 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Air Liquide office in India. We map five, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Air Liquide S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Air Liquide runs 5 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (New Delhi, Chennai, Chengalpattu, Mumbai), covering engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Global Technical Services Director- Software Technology GCC Head
Head of Human Resources, Air Liquide India

about.description: Air Liquide's India footprint covers New Delhi, Chennai, Chengalpattu and Mumbai, spanning engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seventeen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Air Liquide operate in India?
faq.a: Air Liquide operates 5 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Air Liquide have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Air Liquide's India GCC footprint spans New Delhi, Chennai, Chengalpattu and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Air Liquide run in India?
faq.a: Air Liquide runs engineering & design, gcc/gic and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Air Liquide's India GCCs?
faq.a: Air Liquide's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Air Liquide's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 17 leaders at Air Liquide's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
